businessContext.description: I'm searching for the meaning of data within a specific business context
businessContext.exploringDescription: Click the button below to see a list of all data domains.
businessContext.exploringTitle: I'm exploring the meaning of data in a business context

infoModal.description: The business part of the data governance model captures data semantics and ownership for the following types of entities:

businessContext.searchInstructions: Search for keywords related to the data domain or data entity that you are looking for.
businessContext.title: Business context

browse.description: Welcome to Aurelius Atlas! We would like to help you get started. Please pick your topic of interest below.

governanceContext.description: I'm searching for the data governance responsibilities of a specific person
governanceContext.exploringDescription: Click the button below to see a list of all people with data governance responsibilities.
governanceContext.exploringTitle: I'm exploring who has data governance responsibilities within my organization

infoModal.description: The data governance model captures various kinds of organizational roles with regards to data governance:

governanceContext.searchInstructions: Search for the name or email address of the person you are looking for.
governanceContext.title: Data governance organization

technicalContext.description: I'm searching for technical information about a specific data field, dataset, or system
technicalContext.exploringDescription: Click the button below to see a list of all systems.
technicalContext.exploringTitle: I'm exploring the technical environments on which data is stored

infoModal.description:
The technical part of the data governance model captures the technical implementation of data, such as where data is stored and the level of data quality. 
 The technical data governance model consists of the following types of entities:

technicalContext.searchInstructions: Search for keywords related to the technical metadata that you are looking for.
technicalContext.title: Technical context

browse.title: Getting started
